subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Us to him who hath turned unto the lights of the Countenance, when the Desired One came with manifest sovereignty, that he might know that which was created [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی انوار الوجه اذ اتی المقصود بسلطان مبین لیعرف ما خلق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
